message:
test(screen): add reflow scorecard content tests and gate edge cases (ft-1memj.29)

Add 5 focused resize reflow scorecard tests:
- Clean code reflows with low badness (short lines fit without wrapping)
- Wide line reflows produce scored lines when resized narrow
- Default scorecard has all-zero fields
- Fallback ratio gate triggers before total badness
- Zero scored lines passes gate (edge case)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
